c1.prompt: Explain how NCCL all-reduce works over RoCE in two short paragraphs.
c1.text_preview: NCCL (NVIDIA Collective Communications Library) all-reduce over RoCE (RDMA over Converged Ethernet) works by leveraging a **ring-based** or **tree-based** algorithm to sum data across GPUs, while using RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) to bypass the CPU and kernel.
